description: From the Publisher Children, Parents and Carers will benefit from: A New Perspective On Thinking Learn about how your mind works, and discover new ways to think, reflect and gain the clarity and confidence of a growth mindset. Put Learning Into Action As well as 60 awesome activities, this workbook has a journal for children to put their learnings into action so they can see how they're working toward their goals everyday. A Kid-Friendly Focus A workbook that can be done independently by children as well as in collaboration with parents, teachers, and carers.
